case_title: URIBE, CARLOS vs. THORNTON, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URIBE, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THORNTON, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 506 GROVE ST #303, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT THORNTON, MICHAEL
